label: KSafe
description: Karoo safety extension on two layers: REACTIVE (crash detection, SOS, check-in, HR-based medical episode and wellness detection) and PREVENTIVE (carb and hydration tracking that adapts to your effort using the Karoo's HR and power zones, reminding you to fuel before bonking or dehydration impair your judgment on the bike). Sends emergency alerts via WhatsApp (CallMeBot), Telegram, Pushover or ntfy. Beta — test before relying on it.
releaseNotes: Added Fueling tab — preventive safety layer. Tracks carb and fluid intake during the ride and reminds you to eat / drink before depletion impairs your judgment on the bike. Carb target adapts in real time to your effort using the Karoo's HR and power zones (multiplier 0.7×–1.3×); hydration target is a flat per-hour rate you adjust for hot days. Two combinable alert modes per category: by deficit (you're behind target) or by time (X minutes since last log). Logging via tap-to-log data fields (3 carb slots + 2 drink slots, each with its own configurable label and amount) and 2 SRAM AXS hardware buttons. Post-ride summary shows totals vs target. All optional and disabled by default. Also: warning-level alerts (wellness HR, fueling reminders) now use the more visible InRideAlert overlay instead of system notifications.
